instructions.name: accept_controller_authority
docs: Accept the pending controller authority (step 2 of 2-step rotation).

accounts.name: new_authority
docs: The pending authority taking over.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller account.

instructions.name: add_yield
docs: Ops top up the vesting vault with new yield USX.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::AddYield`. Also the SPL authority of
`admin_asset_account` — this wallet funds the top-up.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated via `add_yield`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: vesting_vault
docs: Strategy's vesting vault — destination for the top-up.
Mutated by the CPI transfer from admin.

accounts.name: admin_asset_account
docs: Admin's USX source token account.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; signer signs as authority.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: book_loss
docs: Ops book loss against the junior tranche.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::BookLoss`.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy. Signs the asset → loss CPI transfer.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated via `book_loss`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Strategy's asset vault — source of the booked loss.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; strategy PDA signs as authority.

accounts.name: loss_vault
docs: Strategy's loss vault — destination of the booked loss.
Mutated by the CPI transfer.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: cancel_pending_controller_authority
docs: Clear the pending controller authority without rotating.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Current authority.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller account.

instructions.name: cancel_settlement_batch
docs: Ops cancel an active settlement batch.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::CancelSettlementBatch`.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; check for program status.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy.

accounts.name: settlement_batch
docs: Settlement batch. Mutated by `apply_cancel`.

instructions.name: distribute_yield
docs: Ops drip yield from the vesting vault into the asset vault, opening a new
vesting epoch.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::DistributeYield`.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy. Signs the vesting → asset CPI transfer.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated via `distribute_yield`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: vesting_vault
docs: Strategy's vesting vault — source of the drip.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; strategy PDA signs as authority.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Strategy's asset vault — destination of the drip.
Mutated by the CPI transfer.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: edit_admin
docs: Authority replaces an existing admin's permission bitmap.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authored call accessible only to the signer matching Controller.authority

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top level Controller account managing the program.

accounts.name: wallet
docs: The wallet whose admin record is being edited. Used only as the seed
source for the admin PDA below; not deserialised.
wallet would target a different admin PDA (or fail derivation).

accounts.name: admin
docs: Existing admin PDA, selected by the wallet seed. Must already exist.

instructions.name: edit_settlement_batch
docs: Ops edit a settlement batch's settlement time or junior-share cap.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::EditSettlementBatch`.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; check for program status.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy.

accounts.name: settlement_batch
docs: Settlement batch. Mutated by the handler.

instructions.name: edit_strategy
docs: Admin partial-update of strategy config fields.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Program admin wallet with permissions to invoke this instruction.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Program admin PDAs that stores the wallet's permissions.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; check for program status.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Strategy account to be edited, selected by the name seed. Must already exist.

instructions.name: edit_strategy_fee_bps
docs: Admin updates only the senior instant-unlock fee.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Program admin wallet with permissions to invoke this instruction.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Program admin PDA that stores the wallet's permissions.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; check for program status.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Strategy account to be edited, selected by the name seed. Must already exist.

instructions.name: edit_strategy_prices
docs: Admin updates only the restricted/liquidation price levels.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Program admin wallet with permissions to invoke this instruction.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Program admin PDA that stores the wallet's permissions.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; check for program status.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Strategy account to be edited, selected by the name seed. Must already exist.

instructions.name: execute_settlement_batch
docs: Ops settle a batch: burn shares, escrow net USX, route loss.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::ExecuteSettlementBatch`.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated via `apply_junior_settlement`.

accounts.name: settlement_batch
docs: Settlement batch. Mutated via `apply_settle`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: Junior tranche mint. Burned against in this instruction.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Strategy's USX vault. Source of the net + loss transfers.

accounts.name: loss_vault
docs: Strategy's loss vault. Receives `realized_loss`.

accounts.name: batch_share_vault
docs: Per-batch junior token escrow. Burned to zero.

accounts.name: batch_asset_vault
docs: Per-batch USX escrow. Receives `net_assets`.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: init_admin
docs: Authority grants a wallet a new admin record with the given permissions.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authored call accessible only to the signer matching Controller.authority

accounts.name: payer
docs: Payer of the transaction

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top level Controller account managing the program.

accounts.name: wallet
docs: The wallet being granted admin.

accounts.name: admin
docs: New per-wallet admin PDA, seeded by `wallet.key()`.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program

instructions.name: init_controller
docs: Bootstrap the program controller (authority + asset mint).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Becomes `Controller.authority`. Must equal the program's upgrade authority.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Payer of the transaction

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top level Controller account managing the program

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: USX Mint (USX is SPL token)

accounts.name: program_data
docs: Program data account; binds bootstrap to the upgrade authority.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program

instructions.name: init_junior_unlock_share
docs: User opens a per-(batch, user) junior unlock claim PDA.

accounts.name: user
docs: Junior depositor; beneficiary of the claim. Decoupled from `payer` so
multisig users can have a separate fee/rent payer.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Rent payer for the new claim PDA.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; check for program status.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy. Status-checked in `validate`.

accounts.name: settlement_batch
docs: Settlement batch the claim is anchored to.

accounts.name: junior_unlock_share
docs: New per-`(batch, user)` claim PDA. Created with zero shares.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program.

instructions.name: init_senior_unlock_cooldown
docs: User opens a per-user senior cooldown PDA and vault.

accounts.name: user
docs: Senior holder; beneficiary of the cooldown. Decoupled from `payer` so
multisig users can have a separate fee/rent payer.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Rent payer for the new PDA + vault.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy.

accounts.name: senior_unlock_cooldown
docs: New per-`(strategy, user)` cooldown PDA.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: senior_cooldown_vault
docs: Per-user senior cooldown vault. Holds USX queued for withdrawal;
authority is the cooldown PDA itself, so subsequent unlock/withdraw
operations are self-contained against this user's claim.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: init_settlement_batch
docs: Ops open a new junior settlement batch.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Program admin wallet with permission to invoke this instruction.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Payer of the rent for the new batch + escrow accounts.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; needed to address-check the asset mint.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin PDA, asserts the signer's permissions.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy, selected by name. Must already exist.

accounts.name: settlement_batch
docs: New settlement batch account. Seeds bind the batch to its parent
strategy + a unique name; `init` rejects duplicates automatically.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: Junior tranche mint. Address-checked against the parent strategy.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: share_vault
docs: Per-batch junior token escrow. Joins deposit here; settle burns;
cancel returns.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Per-batch USX escrow. Empty pre-settlement; receives net USX on
settle and is drained by withdrawals.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: init_strategy
docs: Authority creates a new strategy (tranche mints, vaults, accounting, config).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authored call accessible only to the signer matching Controller.authority

accounts.name: payer
docs: Payer of the transaction

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top level Controller account managing the program

accounts.name: strategy
docs: New strategy account to be initialized, must not already exist.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting account for the strategy, storing share and asset balances. Initialized alongside the strategy.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Mint of the strategy's underlying asset, must match the controller's recorded asset mint.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: Junior share mint, initialized by this instruction.

accounts.name: senior_mint
docs: Senior share mint, initialized by this instruction.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Asset vault owned by the strategy, initialized by this instruction.
All user funds are ultimately stored here.

accounts.name: vesting_vault
docs: Vesting vault owned by the strategy, initialized by this instruction.
Used to hold the portion of yield that is still vesting and subject to potential loss.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Fee vault owned by the strategy, initialized by this instruction.

accounts.name: loss_vault
docs: Loss vault owned by the strategy, initialized by this instruction.
Used to hold assets that are earmarked to cover losses in the event of a strategy incurred loss.

accounts.name: junior_dead_share_vault
docs: Holds `MIN_TRANCHE_SHARES` junior tokens minted at bootstrap; locked.

accounts.name: senior_dead_share_vault
docs: Holds `MIN_TRANCHE_SHARES` senior tokens minted at bootstrap; locked.

accounts.name: payer_asset_account
docs: Payer's USX source for the bootstrap seed transfer.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program

instructions.name: init_tranche_metadata
docs: Authority attaches Metaplex metadata to both tranche mints.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Program authority (the only caller that may set tranche branding).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Funds the two metadata accounts.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Mint authority of both tranche mints; signs the CPIs as a PDA.

accounts.name: junior_metadata
docs: Junior metadata PDA; created by the Metaplex CPI. Unchecked because not initiated

accounts.name: senior_metadata
docs: Senior metadata PDA; created by the Metaplex CPI. Unchecked because not initiated

instructions.name: junior_lock
docs: User deposits USX and mints junior shares.

accounts.name: user
docs: User locking USX, signs and receives junior tokens.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy, selected by name.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state for the strategy. Mutated by `apply_junior_mint`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: Junior tranche mint. Address-checked against the strategy.
Mutated by the CPI mint to user.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Strategy's USX vault — destination for the locked deposit.
Mutated by the CPI transfer from user.

accounts.name: user_asset_account
docs: User's USX source token account.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; user signs as authority.

accounts.name: user_junior_account
docs: User's destination junior token account.

accounts.name: price_update
docs: Pyth price update for the strategy's underlying asset. Anchor
validates owner + discriminator + borsh layout via
`Account<'_, T>`

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: junior_unlock_queued
docs: User escrows junior shares into a settlement batch.

accounts.name: user
docs: Junior depositor; signs the junior token transfer.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; check for program status.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy.

accounts.name: settlement_batch
docs: Settlement batch the user is joining. Mutated by `apply_join`.

accounts.name: junior_unlock_share
docs: Per-`(batch, user)` claim record. Must already be initialized via
`init_junior_unlock_share`.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: Junior tranche mint. Address-checked against the strategy.

accounts.name: batch_share_vault
docs: Per-batch junior token escrow. Address-checked against the batch;
mutated by the CPI transfer from user.

accounts.name: user_junior_account
docs: User's source junior token account.

accounts.name: price_update
docs: Pyth price update for the strategy's underlying asset.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: junior_withdraw_cancelled
docs: User reclaims junior shares from a cancelled batch.

accounts.name: user
docs: Junior claimant; signs and receives rent on claim PDA close.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; check for program status.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy. Used only to address-check `junior_mint`.

accounts.name: settlement_batch
docs: Settlement batch the user is reclaiming from. Mutated by
`apply_cancelled_withdrawal`.

accounts.name: junior_unlock_share
docs: Per-`(batch, user)` claim record. Closed on success; rent refunded to
`user`. Seeds bind it to this batch and signer, so an attacker cannot
substitute another user's PDA.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: Junior tranche mint. Address-checked against the strategy.

accounts.name: batch_share_vault
docs: Per-batch junior token escrow. Source of the transfer; address-checked
against the batch.

accounts.name: user_junior_account
docs: User's destination junior token account.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: junior_withdraw_settled
docs: User claims their USX from a settled batch.

accounts.name: user
docs: Junior claimant; signs and receives rent on claim PDA close.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy.

accounts.name: settlement_batch
docs: Settlement batch the user is withdrawing from. Mutated by
`apply_settled_withdrawal`.

accounts.name: junior_unlock_share
docs: Per-`(batch, user)` claim record. Closed on success; rent refunded to
`user`. Seeds bind it to this batch and signer, so an attacker cannot
substitute another user's PDA.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: batch_asset_vault
docs: Per-batch USX escrow. Source of the transfer; address-checked against
the batch.

accounts.name: user_asset_account
docs: User's destination USX token account.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: junior_withdraw_winddown
docs: User redeems junior shares post-liquidation against the residual pool.

accounts.name: user
docs: Junior holder; signs and receives USX.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy. Signs the asset_vault → user CPI transfer.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated by `apply_junior_redeem`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: Junior tranche mint. Address-checked against the strategy.
Mutated by the CPI burn.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Strategy's USX vault — source of the redemption transfer.

accounts.name: user_asset_account
docs: User's destination USX token account.

accounts.name: user_junior_account
docs: User's source junior token account; user signs as authority for the
CPI burn.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: liquidate_strategy
docs: Ops book a terminal liquidation loss; protocol applies the junior-first
waterfall internally.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::Liquidate`. In production this signer
is expected to be a multisig.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy. Signs the asset → loss CPI transfer.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated via `reset_vesting_schedule` + `book_loss`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Strategy's asset vault — source of the booked loss.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; strategy PDA signs as authority.

accounts.name: loss_vault
docs: Strategy's loss vault — destination of the booked loss.
Mutated by the CPI transfer.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: propose_controller_authority
docs: Propose a new controller authority (step 1 of 2-step rotation).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Current authority. `has_one` pins this to `Controller.authority`.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller account.

instructions.name: senior_lock
docs: User deposits USX and mints senior shares.

accounts.name: user
docs: User locking USX, signs and receives senior tokens.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy, selected by name.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state for the strategy. Mutated by `apply_senior_mint`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: senior_mint
docs: Senior tranche mint. Address-checked against the strategy.
Mutated by the CPI mint to user.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Strategy's USX vault — destination for the locked deposit.
Mutated by the CPI transfer from user.

accounts.name: user_asset_account
docs: User's USX source token account.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; user signs as authority.

accounts.name: user_senior_account
docs: User's destination senior token account.

accounts.name: price_update
docs: Pyth price update for the strategy's underlying asset. Anchor
validates owner + discriminator + borsh layout via
`Account<'_, T>`

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: senior_unlock_instant
docs: User burns senior shares and receives USX instantly, minus a fee.

accounts.name: user
docs: Senior holder; signs and receives net USX.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated by `apply_senior_instant_unlock`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: senior_mint
docs: Senior tranche mint. Address-checked against the strategy.
Mutated by the CPI burn.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Strategy's USX vault — source of both the fee and net transfers.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Strategy's fee vault — destination of `fee`.

accounts.name: user_asset_account
docs: User's destination USX token account.

accounts.name: user_senior_account
docs: User's source senior token account; user signs as authority for the
CPI burn.

accounts.name: price_update
docs: Pyth price update for the strategy's underlying asset.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: senior_unlock_queued
docs: User burns senior shares and queues USX in their cooldown vault.

accounts.name: user
docs: Senior holder; signs the senior burn.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated by `apply_senior_redeem`.

accounts.name: senior_unlock_cooldown
docs: Per-`(strategy, user)` cooldown PDA. Must already be initialized.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: senior_mint
docs: Senior tranche mint. Address-checked against the strategy.
Mutated by the CPI burn.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Strategy's USX vault — source of the gross redemption transfer.

accounts.name: senior_cooldown_vault
docs: Per-user senior cooldown vault — destination of the gross redemption.
Address-checked against the cooldown PDA's seeds.

accounts.name: user_senior_account
docs: User's source senior token account; user signs as authority for the
CPI burn.

accounts.name: price_update
docs: Pyth price update for the strategy's underlying asset.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: senior_withdraw
docs: User drains their cooldown vault after cooldown elapses.

accounts.name: user
docs: Senior holder; signs and receives USX.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy.

accounts.name: senior_unlock_cooldown
docs: Per-`(strategy, user)` cooldown PDA. Mutated to clear `assets_pending`
and `earliest_withdraw_at`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: senior_cooldown_vault
docs: Per-user senior cooldown vault. Source of the transfer; authority is
the cooldown PDA which signs the withdrawal.

accounts.name: user_asset_account
docs: User's destination USX token account.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: senior_withdraw_winddown
docs: User redeems senior shares post-liquidation against the residual pool.

accounts.name: user
docs: Senior holder; signs and receives USX.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy. Signs the asset_vault → user CPI transfer.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated by `apply_senior_redeem`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: senior_mint
docs: Senior tranche mint. Address-checked against the strategy.
Mutated by the CPI burn.

accounts.name: asset_vault
docs: Strategy's USX vault — source of the redemption transfer.

accounts.name: user_asset_account
docs: User's destination USX token account.

accounts.name: user_senior_account
docs: User's source senior token account; user signs as authority for the
CPI burn.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: set_batch_paused
docs: Admin toggles a settlement batch's pause flag.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::EditSettlementBatch`.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: settlement_batch
docs: Settlement batch whose `is_paused` flag this instruction toggles.

instructions.name: set_program_paused
docs: Admin toggles the program-wide kill switch.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::PauseProgram`.

instructions.name: set_strategy_paused
docs: Admin toggles the per-strategy operational pause.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::PauseStrategy`.

instructions.name: set_strategy_status
docs: Admin lifecycle transition: Active → Liquidating → WindedDown.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::SetStrategyStatus`.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; check for program status.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Mutated when the Liquidating → WindedDown transition fires to clear any
in-flight vesting schedule.

instructions.name: update_tranche_metadata
docs: Authority updates tranche metadata (name/symbol/uri); stays mutable.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Program authority (the only caller that may edit tranche branding).

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Update authority of both metadata accounts; signs the CPIs as a PDA.

instructions.name: withdraw_fee
docs: Ops drain the fee vault to a multisig-controlled account.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::WithdrawFee`. In production this signer
is expected to be a multisig. Also the SPL authority of
`admin_asset_account`, so the destination is bound to the multisig.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy. Signs the fee → admin CPI transfer.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated via `withdraw_fee`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Strategy's fee vault — source of the withdrawal.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; strategy PDA signs as authority.

accounts.name: admin_asset_account
docs: Admin's destination USX token account.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; `signer` is checked as the SPL authority
so funds can only be routed to an account the multisig controls.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: withdraw_loss
docs: Ops drain the loss vault to a multisig-controlled account.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::WithdrawLoss`. In production this signer
is expected to be a multisig. Also the SPL authority of
`admin_asset_account`, so the destination is bound to the multisig.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy. Signs the loss → admin CPI transfer.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated via `withdraw_loss`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: loss_vault
docs: Strategy's loss vault — source of the withdrawal.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; strategy PDA signs as authority.

accounts.name: admin_asset_account
docs: Admin's destination USX token account.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; `signer` is checked as the SPL authority
so funds can only be routed to an account the multisig controls.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

instructions.name: withdraw_pending_yield
docs: Ops drain the vesting vault (inverse of `add_yield`).

accounts.name: signer
docs: Admin signer with `Permission::WithdrawPendingYield`. In production this
signer is expected to be a multisig. Also the SPL authority of
`admin_asset_account`, so the destination is bound to the multisig.

accounts.name: controller
docs: Top-level controller; address-checks the asset mint.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Per-wallet admin record.

accounts.name: strategy
docs: Parent strategy. Signs the vesting → admin CPI transfer.

accounts.name: accounting
docs: Accounting state. Mutated via `withdraw_pending_yield`.

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying asset (USX) mint. Address-checked against the controller.

accounts.name: vesting_vault
docs: Strategy's vesting vault — source of the withdrawal.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; strategy PDA signs as authority.

accounts.name: admin_asset_account
docs: Admin's destination USX token account.
Mutated by the CPI transfer; `signer` is checked as the SPL authority
so funds can only be routed to an account the multisig controls.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL Token program.

errors.name: MathError
errors.msg: Math operation failed (overflow, underflow, or cast)

errors.name: InvalidAuthority
errors.msg: Only the Program authority can access this instruction

errors.name: NoPendingAuthority
errors.msg: No pending authority rotation is in flight

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller lacks the required permission

errors.name: InvalidAssetMint
errors.msg: Asset mint does not match configuration

errors.name: InvalidJuniorMint
errors.msg: Junior mint does not match strategy configuration

errors.name: InvalidSeniorMint
errors.msg: Senior mint does not match strategy configuration

errors.name: InvalidStrategyStatus
errors.msg: Strategy status is invalid

errors.name: PriceFeedNotFullyVerified
errors.msg: Price feed update is not fully verified

errors.name: MismatchedFeedId
errors.msg: Price feed id does not match strategy configuration

errors.name: PriceTooOld
errors.msg: Price feed update is older than the configured maximum age

errors.name: PriceUnreliable
errors.msg: Price feed update is unreliable: non-positive price, or confidence exceeds configured maximum

errors.name: InsufficientShares
errors.msg: Not enough shares outstanding to burn

errors.name: InsufficientAssets
errors.msg: Not enough assets in tranche to withdraw

errors.name: LiquidationPriceReached
errors.msg: STRC price is at or below the configured liquidation level

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Quoted shares fall short of the requested minimum

errors.name: ZeroSharesMint
errors.msg: Deposit is too small to mint any shares at the current price

errors.name: ZeroAssetsDeposit
errors.msg: Zero assets deposited

errors.name: ZeroSharesUnlock
errors.msg: Shares to unlock is zero

errors.name: ShareCapExceeded
errors.msg: Mint would exceed the tranche's supply cap

errors.name: RestrictedPriceReached
errors.msg: STRC price is at or below the configured restricted level

errors.name: JuniorQueueCutoffPassed
errors.msg: Batch settlement is too close; queue in a later batch

errors.name: BelowMinimumUnlock
errors.msg: Shares to unlock fall below the configured minimum

errors.name: SettlementBeforeDate
errors.msg: Settlement is not yet allowed before the batch's settlement date

errors.name: LossExceedsRedemption
errors.msg: Realized loss exceeds the gross junior redemption

errors.name: LossExceedsConfiguredCap
errors.msg: Realized loss exceeds the configured per-batch cap

errors.name: FeeExceedsRedemption
errors.msg: Instant-unlock fee exceeds the gross senior redemption

errors.name: ZeroAssetsUnlock
errors.msg: Net assets payable to the user is zero

errors.name: CooldownNotElapsed
errors.msg: Senior cooldown has not elapsed yet

errors.name: ZeroYield
errors.msg: Yield to distribute is zero

errors.name: SeniorYieldExceedsTotal
errors.msg: Senior yield exceeds total yield

errors.name: ZeroLoss
errors.msg: Loss to book is zero

errors.name: SeniorLossExceedsTotal
errors.msg: Senior loss exceeds total loss

errors.name: ZeroAssetsWithdraw
errors.msg: Assets to withdraw is zero

errors.name: PauseStateUnchanged
errors.msg: Pause state is already at the requested value

errors.name: StrategyPaused
errors.msg: Strategy is paused

errors.name: ProgramPaused
errors.msg: Program is paused

errors.name: InvalidStrategyName
errors.msg: Strategy name must be 1..=32 bytes

errors.name: InvalidSettlementBatchName
errors.msg: Settlement batch name must be 1..=32 bytes

errors.name: InvalidSettlementTime
errors.msg: Settlement time must be in the future

errors.name: InvalidStrategyConfig
errors.msg: Strategy config is invalid

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Not enough balance to perform the operation

errors.name: VestingOverlap
errors.msg: Vesting schedule overlaps with existing schedule

errors.name: LossMoreThanVestedAssets
errors.msg: Loss exceeds vested assets

errors.name: InvalidOperation
errors.msg: Invalid operation

errors.name: InvalidStrategyStatusTransition
errors.msg: Strategy status transition is not allowed

errors.name: InvalidSettlementBatchStatus
errors.msg: Settlement batch status is invalid

errors.name: InvalidSettlementBatchStatusForOperation
errors.msg: Settlement batch is in the wrong status for this operation

errors.name: SettlementBatchPaused
errors.msg: Settlement batch is paused

errors.name: OrphanedTrancheAssets
errors.msg: Redemption would leave non-zero tranche assets backing zero or below-minimum shares

errors.name: WouldDrainJuniorClaim
errors.msg: Book loss would drain junior claim to zero; use liquidate_strategy instead

errors.name: BatchJuniorCapExceeded
errors.msg: Junior unlock would exceed the batch's max_junior_shares cap

errors.name: InvalidBatchJuniorCap
errors.msg: Batch junior cap must be 0 or at or above current total_shares

types.name: AccountingState
docs: Tracks share supply, asset balances, and linear vesting for the senior
and junior tranches. Junior amounts are derived as `total - senior`.

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable identifier matching the owning [`crate::state::Strategy`].

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this accounting account.

fields.name: senior_shares
docs: Outstanding senior tranche shares.

fields.name: junior_shares
docs: Outstanding junior tranche shares.

fields.name: total_assets
docs: Total assets backing both tranches (includes unvested portion).

fields.name: senior_assets
docs: Portion of `total_assets` allocated to the senior tranche.

fields.name: total_vesting_assets
docs: Total assets currently subject to the active vesting schedule.

fields.name: senior_vesting_assets
docs: Senior portion of `total_vesting_assets`.

fields.name: vesting_start_time
docs: Unix timestamp when vesting begins; before this, all vesting assets are unvested.

fields.name: vesting_end_time
docs: Unix timestamp when vesting completes; at/after this, all vesting assets are vested.

fields.name: vesting_vault_balance
docs: Total assets (USX) in the vesting vault (pending yields)

fields.name: loss_vault_balance
docs: Total assets (USX) in the loss vault

fields.name: fee_vault_balance
docs: Total assets (USX) in the fee vault

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved space for future fields.

types.name: AddYieldEvent
docs: Emitted by `add_yield`. Records the admin top-up of USX into the
strategy's vesting vault — yield is held there until `distribute_yield`
rolls a new vesting epoch.

types.name: AddYieldParams
docs: Args for topping up the strategy's vesting vault with new yield.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: assets_to_top_up
docs: Amount of USX (raw token units) to top up to the vesting vault.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this account.

fields.name: wallet
docs: The admin wallet — also the second seed component.

fields.name: permissions
docs: Bitmap of granted capabilities.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved space for future fields.

types.name: AdminPermissionsEvent
docs: Emitted by both `init_admin` and `edit_admin`. `is_init` distinguishes
the first-time grant from a subsequent edit; `permissions` is the full
post-write bitmap.

types.name: BookLossEvent
docs: Emitted by `book_loss`. Records the USX moved from `asset_vault` to
`loss_vault`. Junior tranche absorbs the entire amount in BAU/Restricted
operation; the liquidation instruction emits its own event with
a `senior_loss` field.

types.name: BookLossParams
docs: Args for booking a realised trading loss against the junior tranche.
`senior_loss` is intentionally omitted — `book_loss` shields senior assets
in BAU/Restricted operation.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: total_loss
docs: Total USX (raw token units) to move from `asset_vault` to `loss_vault`.
Junior tranche absorbs the entire amount via `total_assets - senior_assets`.

types.name: CancelSettlementBatchEvent
docs: Emitted by `cancel_settlement_batch`. Records the cancel and the
`total_shares` snapshot — i.e. how many junior tokens are now waiting
to be reclaimed by their owners via `junior_withdraw_cancelled`.

types.name: CancelSettlementBatchParams
docs: Args for cancelling a junior settlement batch.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: batch_name
docs: Target settlement batch name. PDA seed.

types.name: Controller
docs: Program-level singleton account. Holds settings shared across every
strategy under this program (authority, the deposit asset mint, global
pause). Per-strategy state lives in [`crate::state::Strategy`].

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this controller account.

fields.name: authority
docs: Admin authority allowed to invoke privileged instructions.

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Two-step rotation slot. `Pubkey::default()` when no rotation is in
flight; otherwise the address that `accept_controller_authority` will
promote into `authority`.

fields.name: asset_mint
docs: Deposit asset mint (USX) shared by all strategies under this program.

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Program-wide pause toggle (1 = paused). Halts all strategies regardless
of their individual pause/lifecycle state.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved space for future fields.

types.name: ControllerAuthorityRotationEvent
docs: Emitted by `propose_controller_authority`, `accept_controller_authority`,
and `cancel_pending_controller_authority`. Carries a pre/post snapshot of
both `authority` and `pending_authority` so an indexer can reconstruct
the rotation lifecycle from a single event stream.
Per-kind semantics:
- `Proposed`: `authority_before == authority_after`;
`pending_authority_after` is the proposed pubkey (non-default).
- `Accepted`: `authority_after == pending_authority_before`;
`pending_authority_after == Pubkey::default()`.
- `Cancelled`: `authority_before == authority_after`;
`pending_authority_after == Pubkey::default()`.

fields.name: signer
docs: Wallet that invoked the instruction

types.name: ControllerAuthorityRotationKind
docs: Discriminates the three controller-authority-rotation instructions
emitting [`ControllerAuthorityRotationEvent`]. Variant indices are stable;
only append new variants at the end.

types.name: DistributeYieldEvent
docs: Emitted by `distribute_yield`. Records the dripped amount, senior split,
and the new vesting window so indexers can track the schedule without
re-reading state.

types.name: DistributeYieldParams
docs: Args for dripping vested yield from the vesting vault into the asset vault.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: total_yield
docs: Total USX (raw token units) to drip from the vesting vault into the
asset vault.

fields.name: senior_yield
docs: Senior tranche's portion of `total_yield`. Junior gets the remainder
implicitly.

types.name: EditSettlementBatchEvent
docs: Emitted by `edit_settlement_batch`. Carries the post-edit snapshot of
the editable fields so indexers can reflect the change without diffing
against prior state.

types.name: EditSettlementBatchParams
docs: Args for editing a junior settlement batch. Each `Option` field is
optional — `None` leaves the on-chain value unchanged.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: batch_name
docs: Target settlement batch name. PDA seed.

fields.name: settlement_time
docs: New earliest unix time at which settlement may run. Must be at or
after the current chain time when set.

fields.name: max_junior_shares
docs: junior-share cap. `0` disables the check. Lowering below the
current `total_shares` is rejected (would put the batch past its
own cap).

types.name: EditStrategyEvent
docs: Emitted by any strategy-config edit instruction. Carries the full
post-edit config snapshot — indexers can answer "what is the config now?"
without comparing against prior state.

types.name: EditStrategyParams
docs: Partial update bundle. Each `Some` overwrites the corresponding `Strategy`
field; `None` leaves it as-is. `name` selects the strategy by PDA seed and
is itself immutable — there is no rename path.

types.name: ExecuteSettlementBatchEvent
docs: Emitted by `execute_settlement_batch`. Records what was burned and how the
gross redemption was split between the batch escrow (net) and the loss
vault (realized_loss).

types.name: ExecuteSettlementBatchParams
docs: Args for settling a junior settlement batch.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: batch_name
docs: Target settlement batch name. PDA seed.

fields.name: realized_loss
docs: USX loss admin is declaring for this batch (taken from the gross
junior redemption and routed to the loss vault). Must satisfy
`loss <= gross` and the strategy's `max_settlement_loss_bps` cap.

types.name: InitControllerEvent
docs: Emitted by `init_controller`. One per program deployment.

types.name: InitJuniorUnlockShareEvent
docs: Emitted by `init_junior_unlock_share`. Records a user opening their
per-`(strategy, batch)` claim PDA.

types.name: InitJuniorUnlockShareParams
docs: Args for opening a per-`(strategy, batch, user)` junior unlock claim PDA.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed for the settlement batch lookup.

fields.name: batch_name
docs: Target settlement batch name. PDA seed.

types.name: InitSeniorUnlockCooldownEvent
docs: Emitted by `init_senior_unlock_cooldown`. Records a user opening their
per-`(strategy, user)` cooldown PDA + vault.

types.name: InitSeniorUnlockCooldownParams
docs: Args for opening a per-`(strategy, user)` senior cooldown PDA + vault.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

types.name: InitSettlementBatchEvent
docs: Emitted by `init_settlement_batch`. Carries the batch identity and the
initial settlement window so an indexer can register the new batch
without re-reading the account.

fields.name: max_junior_shares
docs: `0` if the batch has no junior-share cap.

types.name: InitSettlementBatchParams
docs: Args for opening a new junior settlement batch.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. Used as a PDA seed.

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable batch identifier (e.g. "MAY-25-01"). Used as a PDA
seed; uniqueness is enforced by the `init` constraint on the batch
account.

fields.name: settlement_time
docs: Earliest unix time at which settlement may be executed.

fields.name: max_junior_shares
docs: Optional cap on the cumulative junior shares this batch will accept.
First-come-first-serve: joins past the cap reject. 0 disables.

types.name: InitStrategyEvent
docs: Emitted by `init_strategy`. Carries the full launch config so an indexer
can reconstruct the strategy without separately reading the account.

types.name: JuniorLockEvent
docs: Emitted by `junior_lock`. Captures the deposited USX and minted junior
shares so an indexer can track tranche TVL without re-reading state.

types.name: JuniorLockParams
docs: Args for a junior tranche mint.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. Used as a PDA seed.

fields.name: assets_to_deposit
docs: Amount of USX (raw token units) the user is locking.

fields.name: min_shares_out
docs: Slippage protection: minimum shares to receive.

types.name: JuniorUnlockQueuedEvent
docs: Emitted by `junior_unlock_queued`. `shares_to_unlock` is the delta from
this call; `user_total_shares` is the running total in the user's
`JuniorUnlockShare` PDA after the update.

types.name: JuniorUnlockQueuedParams
docs: Args for joining (or topping up) a junior settlement batch.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: batch_name
docs: Target settlement batch name. PDA seed.

fields.name: shares_to_unlock
docs: Junior tokens to escrow into the batch. Per-call minimum is enforced
against `Strategy.junior_minimum_unlock_shares` when configured.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this account.

fields.name: batch
docs: Settlement batch this claim belongs to. Also a PDA seed component.

fields.name: user
docs: Owner of this claim. Also a PDA seed component; only this wallet can
withdraw from this position.

fields.name: shares
docs: Junior shares the user has contributed to the batch. Monotonically
increases via top-ups while the batch is Active; consumed in full when
the user withdraws (the account is then closed).

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved space for future fields.

types.name: JuniorWithdrawCancelledEvent
docs: Emitted by `junior_withdraw_cancelled`. Records a junior reclaiming their
junior tokens from a cancelled batch and consuming their claim PDA.

types.name: JuniorWithdrawCancelledParams
docs: Args for reclaiming junior tokens from a cancelled settlement batch.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: batch_name
docs: Target settlement batch name. PDA seed.

types.name: JuniorWithdrawSettledEvent
docs: Emitted by `junior_withdraw_settled`. Records a junior consuming their
claim against a settled batch — `shares_burned` is the share count
retired from the batch pool and `assets_withdrawn` is the USX moved out
of the batch escrow to the user.

types.name: JuniorWithdrawSettledParams
docs: Args for claiming USX from a settled junior settlement batch.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: batch_name
docs: Target settlement batch name. PDA seed.

types.name: JuniorWithdrawWinddownEvent
docs: Emitted by `junior_withdraw_winddown`. Records a junior redeeming junior
tokens against the post-liquidation pool — `shares_burned` is destroyed
and `assets_withdrawn` is moved out of `asset_vault` to the user.

types.name: JuniorWithdrawWinddownParams
docs: Args for redeeming junior tokens after the strategy has winded down.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: shares_to_unlock
docs: Junior shares to burn.

types.name: LiquidateStrategyEvent
docs: Emitted by `liquidate_strategy`. Terminal loss-booking event of the
strategy lifecycle; carries a comprehensive pre/post snapshot so an
indexer or auditor can reconstruct the full impact without re-reading
state.

types.name: LiquidateStrategyParams
docs: Args for booking the terminal liquidation loss.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: total_loss
docs: Total USX (raw token units) moved from `asset_vault` to `loss_vault`.
The protocol applies the waterfall internally: junior absorbs first,
senior absorbs only the residual once junior is fully wiped.

types.name: MetadataInput
docs: Name/symbol/uri for one tranche mint

types.name: Permission
docs: Single capability. Variant index == bit position in the persisted bitmap,
so the enum is the single source of truth for which bit is which.
Adding a new permission: append the next variant. NEVER reorder or remove
— existing on-chain `Admin.permissions` bitmaps depend on the position.

types.name: ProposeControllerAuthorityParams
docs: Args for proposing a new controller authority. Two-step rotation:
the address set here must call `accept_controller_authority` to take over.

fields.name: new_authority
docs: Address the current authority is proposing to take over.

types.name: SeniorLockEvent
docs: Emitted by `senior_lock`. Captures the deposited USX and minted senior
shares so an indexer can track tranche TVL without re-reading state.

types.name: SeniorLockParams
docs: Args for a senior tranche mint.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. Used as a PDA seed.

fields.name: assets_to_deposit
docs: Amount of USX (raw token units) the user is locking.

fields.name: min_shares_out
docs: Slippage protection: minimum shares to receive.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this account.

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: PDA bump for the per-user `senior_cooldown_vault`.

fields.name: user
docs: Owner of this cooldown. Also a PDA seed component; only this wallet
can queue into / withdraw from this cooldown.

fields.name: assets_pending
docs: USX the program currently owes this user, accumulated across queue
calls. Drains to zero on a successful `senior_withdraw`.

fields.name: earliest_withdraw_at
docs: Earliest time `senior_withdraw` may run. Extended (never advanced) on
each new queue: `max(self, now + senior_queue_time_seconds)`.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved space for future fields.

types.name: SeniorUnlockInstantEvent
docs: Emitted by `senior_unlock_instant`. Captures the burned senior shares,
the gross USX redemption, the fee routed to the fee vault, and the net
USX paid to the user.

types.name: SeniorUnlockInstantParams
docs: Args for an instant senior unlock.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. Used as a PDA seed.

fields.name: shares_to_unlock
docs: Senior shares to burn.

fields.name: min_assets_out
docs: Slippage protection: minimum net USX (post-fee) the user accepts.

types.name: SeniorUnlockQueuedEvent
docs: Emitted by `senior_unlock_queued`. `assets_added` is the gross USX from
this call; `total_assets_pending` is the accumulated balance on the
user's cooldown PDA after the update; `earliest_withdraw_at` is the
post-update deadline (`max(prior_value, now + senior_queue_time_seconds)`).

types.name: SeniorUnlockQueuedParams
docs: Args for queueing a senior unlock with a cooldown.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. Used as a PDA seed.

fields.name: shares_to_unlock
docs: Senior shares to burn.

fields.name: min_assets_out
docs: Slippage protection: minimum USX the user accepts for this queue.

types.name: SeniorWithdrawEvent
docs: Emitted by `senior_withdraw`. Records the cooldown PDA draining to the
user; `assets_pending` resets to 0 on the PDA but the PDA itself stays
alive for reuse on subsequent queues.

types.name: SeniorWithdrawParams
docs: Args for withdrawing senior USX from a cooldown PDA after the cooldown
elapsed.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

types.name: SeniorWithdrawWinddownEvent
docs: Emitted by `senior_withdraw_winddown`. Records a senior redeeming senior
tokens against the post-liquidation pool — `shares_burned` is destroyed
and `assets_withdrawn` is moved out of `asset_vault` to the user.

types.name: SeniorWithdrawWinddownParams
docs: Args for redeeming senior tokens after the strategy has winded down.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: shares_to_unlock
docs: Senior shares to burn.

types.name: SetBatchPausedParams
docs: Args for toggling the per-batch operational pause flag.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed for the settlement batch lookup.

fields.name: batch_name
docs: Target settlement batch name. PDA seed.

fields.name: new_is_paused
docs: Requested pause state. Must differ from the current value.

types.name: SetStrategyStatusEvent
docs: Emitted by `set_strategy_status`. Statuses are sent as raw `u8` to match
on-chain storage; consumers map them back via `StrategyStatus`.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Name of the parent strategy. Also a PDA seed component.

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable batch identifier (e.g. "MAY-25-01"), UTF-8 right-padded
with zeros. Also a PDA seed component.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this batch account.

fields.name: share_vault_bump
docs: PDA bump for `share_vault`.

fields.name: asset_vault_bump
docs: PDA bump for `asset_vault`.

fields.name: share_vault
docs: Junior token escrow. Holds shares deposited by joining users until
settlement (then burned) or cancellation (then returned).

fields.name: asset_vault
docs: USX escrow. Empty pre-settlement; receives net redemption USX on settle.

fields.name: status
docs: Lifecycle phase as a `SettlementBatchStatus`.

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Operational pause toggle (1 = paused).

fields.name: settlement_time
docs: Earliest time at which settlement is permitted. Editable by ops
(postpone). Used to enforce per-user `junior_queue_time` on join.

fields.name: settled_at
docs: Time at which settlement was applied. Zero until Settled.

fields.name: total_shares
docs: Outstanding junior claim against this batch.

fields.name: total_assets
docs: USX held in `asset_vault` and claimable by `total_shares`.

fields.name: realized_loss
docs: Loss booked against this batch at settlement, in USX. Zero pre-settle.
Stored for transparency / audit; not used in withdrawal math.

fields.name: max_junior_shares
docs: Cap on `total_shares` for this batch. Joins are rejected once the
cumulative junior shares would exceed this; first-come-first-serve.
0 disables the check.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved space for future fields.

types.name: Strategy
docs: Per-strategy account. Owns the tranche mints and program vaults, and stores
all configuration that gates user instructions. One instance per isolated
strategy; multiple strategies coexist under the same program.

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable identifier, UTF-8 bytes right-padded with zeros.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this strategy account.

fields.name: junior_mint_bump
docs: PDA bump for `junior_mint`.

fields.name: senior_mint_bump
docs: PDA bump for `senior_mint`.

fields.name: asset_vault_bump
docs: PDA bump for `asset_vault`.

fields.name: vesting_vault_bump
docs: PDA bump for `vesting_vault`.

fields.name: fee_vault_bump
docs: PDA bump for `fee_vault`.

fields.name: loss_vault_bump
docs: PDA bump for `loss_vault`.

fields.name: junior_mint
docs: Junior tranche token mint (first-loss capital).

fields.name: senior_mint
docs: Senior tranche token mint (protected capital, paid first).

fields.name: asset_vault
docs: Holds the strategy's USX book value backing both tranches.

fields.name: vesting_vault
docs: Temporarily holds yield USX after `add_yield` for distribution.

fields.name: fee_vault
docs: Collects fees.

fields.name: loss_vault
docs: Holds USX moved out of `asset_vault` to account for booked losses.

fields.name: status
docs: Lifecycle phase as a `StrategyStatus`.

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Operational pause toggle (1 = paused).

fields.name: pyth_price_feed_id
docs: Pyth price feed ID for the underlying asset.

fields.name: price_max_age
docs: Maximum age (in seconds) of a Pyth price update before it's considered
stale and rejected.

fields.name: price_max_conf_bps
docs: Reject Pyth price updates whose `conf` (confidence interval) exceeds
this fraction of `price`, in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%). 0 disables
the check.

fields.name: restricted_price
docs: Underlying asset price level at which queued unlocks become restricted,
but the strategy is not yet eligible for liquidation. Scaled by
`10^[crate::STRATEGY_PRICE_EXPONENT]` (6 decimals; e.g. `1_000_000` = $1.00).

fields.name: liquidation_price
docs: Underlying asset price level that gates mints and withdrawals and
unlocks the liquidation path. Scaled by
`10^[crate::STRATEGY_PRICE_EXPONENT]` (6 decimals; e.g. `500_000` = $0.50).

fields.name: yield_vesting_period_seconds
docs: Duration over which newly distributed yield vests linearly into the
tranches.

fields.name: junior_queue_time_seconds
docs: Minimum time a junior unlock request must sit in a settlement batch
before the batch can settle.

fields.name: senior_queue_time_seconds
docs: Cooldown duration for a queued senior unlock before withdrawal is
permitted.

fields.name: junior_share_cap
docs: Maximum total junior tranche shares outstanding. Mints that would
exceed this are rejected.

fields.name: senior_share_cap
docs: Maximum total senior tranche shares outstanding. Mints that would
exceed this are rejected.

fields.name: junior_minimum_unlock_shares
docs: Minimum share amount for a single junior unlock; 0 disables the check.
Reduces operational overhead from dust-sized unlocks.

fields.name: senior_minimum_unlock_shares
docs: Minimum share amount for a single senior unlock; 0 disables the check.

fields.name: senior_instant_unlock_fee_bps
docs: Fee charged on senior instant unlock, in basis points (1 bps = 0.01%).
Routed to `fee_vault`. Capped at
[`crate::MAX_SENIOR_INSTANT_UNLOCK_FEE_BPS`] (< 100%) so the instant
unlock always leaves a non-zero net for non-dust redemptions.

fields.name: max_settlement_loss_bps
docs: Operational sanity check against admin decimal-point errors at
settlement, not a user-facing slippage cap. Bps of the settlement's
gross junior redemption (1 bps = 0.01%). `0` means uncapped (up to
100% loss permitted), NOT "0% loss permitted".

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved space for future fields.

types.name: StrategyStatus
docs: Lifecycle phase of the strategy. Independent of `is_paused`, which is an
operational toggle that can apply within any lifecycle phase.

types.name: TrancheMetadataEvent
docs: Emitted by `init_tranche_metadata` (both tranches) and
`update_tranche_metadata` (the `Some` tranches). Values live in the Metaplex
accounts and the instruction data.

types.name: VerificationLevel
docs:
* This enum represents how many guardian signatures were checked for a Pythnet price update
 * If full, guardian quorum has been attained
 * If partial, at least config.minimum signatures have been verified, but in the case config.minimum_signatures changes in the future we also include the number of signatures that were checked

types.name: WithdrawFeeEvent
docs: Emitted by `withdraw_fee`. Records USX moved out of `fee_vault` to the
admin's destination account. Routed via the strategy PDA, which is the
SPL authority of the source vault.

types.name: WithdrawFeeParams
docs: Args for moving accumulated fees out of the strategy's `fee_vault`.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: assets_to_withdraw
docs: Amount of USX (raw token units) to move from `fee_vault` to the
admin's destination account.

types.name: WithdrawLossEvent
docs: Emitted by `withdraw_loss`. Records USX moved out of `loss_vault` to the
admin's destination account. Routed via the strategy PDA, which is the
SPL authority of the source vault.

types.name: WithdrawLossParams
docs: Args for moving booked losses out of the strategy's `loss_vault`. Drains
flow to the multisig so the underlying USX can be redeemed against the
realized STRC loss off-chain.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: assets_to_withdraw
docs: Amount of USX (raw token units) to move from `loss_vault` to the
admin's destination account.

types.name: WithdrawPendingYieldEvent
docs: Emitted by `withdraw_pending_yield`. Records USX moved out of `vesting_vault`
(pre-distribution operator top-up) back to the admin's destination account.
Inverse of `add_yield`. Routed via the strategy PDA, which is the SPL
authority of the source vault.

fields.name: strategy_name
docs: Parent strategy name. PDA seed.

fields.name: assets_to_withdraw
docs: Amount of USX (raw token units) to move from `vesting_vault` to the
admin's destination account.

constants.name: BATCH_NAME_SEPARATOR
docs: Separator seed inserted between `strategy_name` and `batch_name` in
batch-family PDAs (settlement_batch, batch_share_vault, batch_asset_vault).
Prevents seed-concatenation collisions between distinct (strategy_name,
batch_name) pairs. Uses NULL — already excluded by the `is_ascii_graphic`
validation on stored names — so the demarcation is unambiguous.

constants.name: MAX_COOLDOWN_SECONDS
docs: Ceiling on user-facing queue/cooldown windows (`senior_queue_time_seconds`,
`junior_queue_time_seconds`). Caps the worst-case admin decimal-point error.

constants.name: MAX_PRICE_MAX_AGE
docs: Ceiling on `Strategy.price_max_age`. Catches admin decimal-point errors;
production max-age values are seconds-to-minutes.

constants.name: MAX_SENIOR_INSTANT_UNLOCK_FEE_BPS
docs: Ceiling on `Strategy.senior_instant_unlock_fee_bps`. Kept well below 100%
(10_000 bps): at exactly 100% the fee equals the gross redemption for every
amount, so `net == 0` always trips the `ZeroAssetsUnlock` guard in
`senior_unlock_instant` — the path looks validly configured but is silently
disabled. 20% sits above any realistic exit penalty while keeping the path
live for all non-dust redemptions.

constants.name: MAX_VESTING_OVERLAP_SECONDS
docs: Tolerance for back-to-back `distribute_yield` calls: a new vesting epoch
may start up to this many seconds before the previous one ends. Keeps
scheduled ops resilient to network/queue jitter without letting an admin
instantly graduate the previous unvested tail.
`Strategy.yield_vesting_period_seconds` must exceed this so the
"no-overlap" guard inside `distribute_yield` cannot be sidestepped via
`saturating_sub`.

constants.name: MAX_VESTING_PERIOD_SECONDS
docs: Ceiling on `Strategy.yield_vesting_period_seconds`. Mirrors the cooldown
cap; longer than any realistic yield cadence.

constants.name: MIN_TRANCHE_SHARES
docs: Floor on tranche share supply enforced on every redemption. Reaching
zero is rejected — the operational pattern is to seed each tranche
with at least this many shares at bootstrap.

constants.name: STRATEGY_PRICE_EXPONENT
docs: log10 exponent for `u32` price fields on `Strategy` (`restricted_price`,
`liquidation_price`). A stored value of `1_234_567` represents
`1_234_567 × 10^STRATEGY_PRICE_EXPONENT = 1.234567` USD, i.e. 6 decimals.

constants.name: STRATEGY_PRICE_MIN
docs: Minimum permitted value for `restricted_price` / `liquidation_price` on
`Strategy`. Catches decimal-place mistakes — e.g. submitting `50` thinking
"$50" when the scale would actually represent `$0.00005`. At exponent = `-6`,
this floor is `$0.001`.
